# 01_zero-dose_v2

This is the **static** companion to the interactive Streamlit dashboard.

## Outcome

Children 12-23 months who received zero doses of DTP/Pentavalent vaccine (h3 == 0); alive (b5 == 1); last-born per woman

## Pipeline

`descriptive → esda → ml → causal → digital-twin → dashboard → manuscript`
